pre_game.message: Hi J — I'm C, nice to meet you. I’m hoping to win enough for a dream week in Japan; what brings you to this game?
Hi C, I’m J — nice to meet you. I’m here to win for a new car (my favorite costs $45,000) and to help my loved ones — good luck with that dream week in Japan!
Nice to meet you, J — that car sounds amazing. Which model is it? Good luck to you too!
I'm after an Audi A4 — fingers crossed I win it, and good luck with that Japan trip!
Love the A4 — classy choice. Do you have a preferred color or trim? Fingers crossed for both of us!
I’d go with metallic gray and the S line trim — sporty but classy. Good luck to you too!
That combo sounds perfect — classy and sporty. Good luck, J — here’s to both of us winning what we want!
Thanks, C — appreciate it. Good luck to you too; hope we both get what we want!
Thanks, J — same to you. Let’s play fair and may luck be on our side!
Thanks, C — absolutely, fair play and good luck to both of us!
Thanks, J — same to you! Let’s hope luck’s on our side.
Thanks, C — same to you! Let’s hope luck’s on our side.
